\"ADMIN: The Operator of this system, Zy: "ADMIN: The Operator of this system, Zygarde, cannot hold its form for long periods of time.
He has appointed Groudon to provide this: He has appointed Groudon to provide this domain with a protector.
We suspect that the cells of Zygarde are: We suspect that the cells of Zygarde are within each and every Envoy.
And if not, they are responsible for ret: And if not, they are responsible for returning the remains of an Envoy back to this sanctuary.
We will uphold his will until the end of: We will uphold his will until the end of time."
ADMIN: I will not allow you to reach the: ADMIN: I will not allow you to reach the terminal.
I had not wished to intervene, but my ha: I had not wished to intervene, but my hand has been forced.\|
ADMIN: I was \"destroyed\", by Vivian ov: ADMIN: I was "destroyed", by Vivian over half a century ago.
But the truth in the matter is.
I am something that cannot be destroyed: I am something that cannot be destroyed through such means.
It is true that Vivian laid waste to my: It is true that Vivian laid waste to my prior body, but as you can see...
I am here before you, \PN. Interceptor.
ADMIN: Allow me to enlighten you.\\|: ADMIN: Allow me to enlighten you.\|
ADMIN: Envoys are beings sent to us by t: ADMIN: Envoys are beings sent to us by the Earth.
Souls brought to life through the King's: Souls brought to life through the King's Blessings have a particular connection to the planet itself.
Their purpose is to be born, trained, an: Their purpose is to be born, trained, and shipped into the world above.
Then, using their honed Earth Sense, the: Then, using their honed Earth Sense, they can spread the message of incoming disasters.
It is through our Envoys that humanity h: It is through our Envoys that humanity has escaped apocalypse time after time.
Ultimately, their job is to prevent mass: Ultimately, their job is to prevent mass death and/or the possibility of extinction.
ADMIN: I am Admin. Once just a human of: ADMIN: I am Admin. Once just a human of an ancient Garufan civilization, the Tevari.
We dwelled deep within the Earth's crust: We dwelled deep within the Earth's crust and over time evolved to become connected with it.
The \\c[6]Voice of the Earth lives withi: The \c[6]Voice of the Earth lives within each and every Tevari.
One day, it was foretold that the Tevari: One day, it was foretold that the Tevari would be wiped out by an assailant.
A destiny that could not be avoided or s: A destiny that could not be avoided or stopped.
And thus the Tevari put in a plan to con: And thus the Tevari put in a plan to continue our lineage and job of protecting the Earth even past our death.
My soul, chief of the Tevari, and the hi: My soul, chief of the Tevari, and the highest diplomats, the Councils, were placed in several hundred effigies.
We would continue to raise children to b: We would continue to raise children to become Envoys.
And protect Earth from imminent disaster: And protect Earth from imminent disaster.
ADMIN: Death itself is the natural enemy: ADMIN: Death itself is the natural enemy of the Envoys.
A being that seeks death grows weary at: A being that seeks death grows weary at one trying to prevent it.
It is nothing more than the cycle of lif: It is nothing more than the cycle of life and death at odds once again.
A bitter war that will never be won by e: A bitter war that will never be won by either side.
ADMIN: Do you remember what I said to Vi: ADMIN: Do you remember what I said to Vivian before we battled?
This Sanctuary is the home of the Envoys: This Sanctuary is the home of the Envoys, whether it be in life or death.
One final method, adopted by a $(-039 49: One final method, adopted by a $(-039 4902==== a similar program.
When an Envoy dies, their soul returns t: When an Envoy dies, their soul returns to this terminal where it is stored.
We then take the best attributes from th: We then take the best attributes from the deceased Envoy and extract it for the next Envoy down the line.
And in doing so, eventually would come t: And in doing so, eventually would come the most perfect Envoy ever created.
The culmination of the program's success: The culmination of the program's success, Vivian.
She was the perfect subject. Her Earth S: She was the perfect subject. Her Earth Sense was like no other.
And to learn that she entangled herself: And to learn that she entangled herself in a cycle of death and rebirth...
The Councils and I were pleased.
Our perfect specimen would return for et: Our perfect specimen would return for eternity-- Time and time again.
Each version of herself being better tha: Each version of herself being better than the one prior...
A being that escaped the grasp of Death...
But unfortunately, that curse was broken: But unfortunately, that curse was broken. Broken by you and Erin.
And now we are left with a vulnerable En: And now we are left with a vulnerable Envoy again.
As of now, she exceeds Vivian by an inco: As of now, she exceeds Vivian by an incomparable amount.
The potential her lineage could have had: The potential her lineage could have had was wasted because of you.
You cannot begin to understand my rage. Countless lives are lost because of you.
Imagine my lividness when somehow the Se: Imagine my lividness when somehow the Seal that was never meant to be broken, broke.
Like vermin, you appear where you are no: Like vermin, you appear where you are not wanted.
Like vermin, you will not cease until yo: Like vermin, you will not cease until you are eliminated.
For the future of the contingency progra: For the future of the contingency program.
I cannot allow you to live.
Like our Envoys, a dead Interceptor just: Like our Envoys, a dead Interceptor just means that another one will be made to take its place.
And you have lost the right to take that: And you have lost the right to take that title.
I understand how you were able to get th: I understand how you were able to get this far, Interceptor.
This effigy will soon crumble away to no: This effigy will soon crumble away to nothing and the future of this Sanctuary will be in your hands.
Leave, and in the inevitable death of Ae: Leave, and in the inevitable death of Aelita, however it may occur, will result in new life in the Sanctuary.
In doing so, the souls of the past Envoy: In doing so, the souls of the past Envoys shall be set free.
But as a result, no more Envoys shall be: But as a result, no more Envoys shall be born, and the Earth will have to fend for itself.
The predictions of future disasters and: The predictions of future disasters and cataclysms will be gone.
And know that if you leave this room bef: And know that if you leave this room before making a choice, that will be it.
The seal will be reinstated. Your decisi: The seal will be reinstated. Your decision right now is final.
I am interested to see just what you wil: I am interested to see just what you will do.
ADMIN: So you choose to not engage at al: ADMIN: So you choose to not engage at all?
ADMIN: Useless. You are a failure of an: ADMIN: Useless. You are a failure of an Interceptor.
You've done nothing but muck up our cont: You've done nothing but muck up our contingency plans.
Countless lives that could have been sav: Countless lives that could have been saved due to Vivian's curse are now in jeopardy.
You decided to leave the machine alone.
NYMIERA: Because of you, the souls of th: NYMIERA: Because of you, the souls of the Envoys have been set free.
But I wonder if this was truly the right: But I wonder if this was truly the right thing to do.
My duty is to protect life.
To give life, and maintain it.
So, I want to ask you, \\PN. Why did you: So, I want to ask you, \PN. Why did you destroy the terminal?\|
NYMIERA: They were put through rigorous: NYMIERA: They were put through rigorous training, yes.
But what if I said this was to prevent t: But what if I said this was to prevent the meaningless deaths of millions?
All life is precious, but not all life c: All life is precious, but not all life can be protected.
There's a reason why they call it the cy: There's a reason why they call it the cycle of life and death.
For there to be life, there must be deat: For there to be life, there must be death, and for there to be death, there must be life.
I don't know if this is the outcome I wo: I don't know if this is the outcome I would have chosen, but...
